title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The video argues that while the US leads in AI chips, models, and applications, it faces a critical disadvantage in power generation and transmission for data centers. China's centralized energy infrastructure, epitomized by its Eastern Data Western Compute strategy and 25,000+ miles of UHV transmission lines, enables rapid hyperscale deployment at 1-2GW buildout capacity. US companies work around fragmented federal-state-local jurisdictions through behind-the-meter deals and off-grid solutions, with Texas and ERCOT emerging as preferred locations.
